description: Armenian-American criminal organization and street gang founded in the late 1980s by Armen Petrosyan in East Hollywood, Los Angeles. Involved in drug trafficking, murder, fraud, identity theft, and racketeering. Has around 200 members and ties to the Mexican Mafia and Russian organized crime. Still active in California and Texas.

country_links.evidence_quote: AP leadership also maintains ties to Armenia and Russia and deals directly with high level Armenian/Russian organized crime figures.
country_links.context: The organization's leadership maintains ties to Armenia and deals directly with high-level Armenian organized crime figures.

country_links.evidence_quote: AP leadership also maintains ties to Armenia and Russia and deals directly with high level Armenian/Russian organized crime figures.
country_links.context: The organization's leadership maintains ties to Russia and deals directly with high-level Russian organized crime figures.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2014, two previous residents of the Los Angeles area who declared themselves members of Armenian Power were videotaped in Syria fighting in support of then-Syrian President Bashar al-Assad.
country_links.context: Members of the organization were videotaped fighting in Syria in support of President Bashar al-Assad.
